The '''At-cyb husher mike''' was a model of internal, [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] manufactured by [[Crozo Industrial Products/Legends|Crozo Industrial Products]].

==Description==
The At-cyb husher mike was an internal [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] manufactured by [[Crozo Industrial Products/Legends|Crozo Industrial Products]].<ref name="EGWT" /> It used the latest advancements in [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] miniaturization<ref name="GFT" /> and was surgically implanted into the user, inserted near the [[larynx]]. [[Micro-scanner|Microsensors]] were implanted inside the [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]].<ref name="EGWT" /> 

To send a signal, the user would subvocalize the message by subtly replicating the jaw, [[Tongue/Legends|tongue]] and vocal cord movements of normal speech. No sound was produced during this process, and the minimal movements of the jaw and tongue meant that it often went unnoticed by observers. The movements of the subvocalization process,<ref name="EGWT" /> and the vibrations from the vocal cords,<ref name="GFT" /> were translated into electrical impulses by the husher mike, which were in turn converted into a comlink transmission by [[short-range transponder]]s. The signal was capable of being received by an comlink monitoring the broadcast frequency within three [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]].<ref name="EGWT" />

The system could not receive audio transmissions, meaning that a separate comlink or transmitter had to be carried if the user wanted to receive messages. The husher mike was used by individuals would wished to avoid detection by audio surveillance systems such as "[[Audio surveillance system|sound snoopers]]". However, military-grade [[Comm scanner|communications scanner]] could intercept the husher mike's transmissions.<ref name="EGWT" />

The basic At-cyb husher mike was visible and cost three thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. An upgraded model with an [[Encryption module/Legends|encryption module]] could be implanted directly under the skin for an extra two thousand credits. This model was only detectable with [[Medical scanner/Legends|medical]] or [[Weapon detector|weapons scanners]].<ref name="EGWT" />
